title: Two Tails Craft
description:
A fun little modpack for Two Tails Tavern! All mods are respected to their owners.

If you find any issues please contact floofie_proto
body:
Two Tails Craft is a Mopack designed for the Two Tails Tavern Discord Server, focusing on adventure, bosses, and machines. If you have any suggestions, please [Join the Discord.](https://discord.gg/qJTz2bCtd2)

If you find any issues, please contact any of the authors!
